title: Customs Declaration Data Extraction Automation for Trade Operations
metaTitle: Customs Declaration Data Extraction Automation | PDF to Excel
metaDescription: Automate customs declaration data extraction from PDFs and images to Excel. Handle multi-language forms with 99%+ accuracy for trade compliance.

hero.headline: Extract Data from Customs Declarations Automatically
hero.subheadline: Convert customs forms, declarations, and trade documents from PDF and images to structured Excel spreadsheets with AI-powered field extraction

summary: Customs declaration data extraction automation converts trade documents from various formats into structured Excel spreadsheets, enabling freight forwarders, customs brokers, and importers to process declarations efficiently while maintaining regulatory compliance across different countries and languages.
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing batch customs declarations from multiple countries
Converting scanned customs forms to digital format
Extracting trade data for compliance reporting and audits
expectedOutputs: Structured Excel files with customs data fields
CSV exports for trade management systems
commonChallenges: Multi-language customs forms requiring translation context
Varying document formats across different countries
Manual data entry errors causing compliance issues
howItWorksSteps: Upload customs declaration PDFs or images to the platform
AI identifies and extracts key trade data fields automatically
Review extracted data including commodity codes and values
Export to Excel with one row per declaration for analysis
whyPdfExcelAiFits: OCR handles scanned customs documents from any country
Custom field selection for specific trade data requirements
Batch processing for multiple declarations simultaneously
99%+ accuracy on clear customs forms reduces compliance risks
limitations: Complex multi-page declarations may require manual verification
Handwritten customs entries have limited recognition accuracy
Heavily damaged or poor-quality scanned documents may miss fields

faq.question: Can this handle customs declarations in different languages?
faq.answer: Yes, the OCR technology can extract text from customs forms in multiple languages, though field identification works best with standard customs declaration layouts.

faq.question: What specific customs data fields can be extracted automatically?
faq.answer: Common fields include commodity descriptions, HS codes, values, weights, country of origin, consignee details, and declaration numbers from standard customs forms.

faq.question: How accurate is the extraction for trade compliance purposes?
faq.answer: The system achieves 99%+ accuracy on clear, typed customs documents, but we recommend reviewing extracted data before submitting for regulatory compliance.

faq.question: Can this process batches of customs declarations at once?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upload multiple customs declaration files simultaneously and receive a single Excel output with one row per declaration for efficient processing.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
99%+ accuracy rate on clear customs documentation
Pay-as-you-go pricing with free trial available
exampleUseCases: Customs broker digitizing client paper declarations
Freight forwarder extracting data from multiple country forms
Importer creating compliance reports from historical declarations
Trade analyst consolidating customs data for duty calculations
